segment.source: Navigate to a section of the app.
Manage your profile and application settings
Welcome to TrAIner! Please complete your profile below — set your preferences, connect your fitness accounts, and choose an AI provider. When you're ready, click "Complete Setup" to get started.
Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
This will permanently delete your account, all training plans, activities, chat history, and integrations. This cannot be undone.
Type DELETE to confirm account deletion
Update your VDOT to calibrate training paces.
Enter a race time or VDOT score to see your training paces.
Select which AI model you want to use for the training assistant.
The selected provider is no longer available. Please choose a different one.
Override the default model. Leave empty to use default.
Faster models for quick plan modifications. Recommended.
Auto-generate coaching summaries when activities match planned workouts.
How the AI Coach frames summaries. The verdict still lands honestly — only the emphasis shifts.
AI summaries use your configured LLM provider to analyse each matched activity. This will consume API tokens and may incur additional costs depending on your provider and usage volume.
Automatically sync the last 7 days when you open the dashboard
Are you sure you want to disconnect Strava? You will need to re-authorize to reconnect.
The AI summary will be prepended to your existing Strava activity description. If other third-party apps also write to your activity description, one may overwrite the other.
Enter your Garmin Connect credentials to sync activities
Your credentials are used to obtain authentication tokens and are not stored.
Please enter your Garmin Connect email and password
Write AI summaries to Garmin Connect
Write AI Summaries to Garmin Connect
The AI summary will be prepended to your existing Garmin Connect activity description. If other third-party apps also write to your activity description, one may overwrite the other.
Remove all TrAIner App workouts from Garmin Connect
Remove all plan workouts from Garmin Connect? This cannot be undone.
Removed {count, plural, one {# workout} other {# workouts}} from Garmin Connect
Are you sure you want to disconnect Garmin?
Automatically push AI-generated coaching summaries to your connected platforms after each matched activity.
When enabled, AI Coach summaries will be prepended to your Strava activity description.
When enabled, AI Coach summaries will be prepended to your Garmin Connect activity description.
The AI summary will be prepended to your existing activity description. If other third-party apps also write to your activity description, one may overwrite the other.
Create a plan to get started
Mark it as complete to preserve it as a historical record.
Moved to {date}. Couldn't update Garmin — resend manually.
Matched {count, plural, one {# activity} other {# activities}}
No workouts to send this week
Sent {count, plural, one {# workout} other {# workouts}} to Garmin
No synced workouts to remove this week
Removed {count, plural, one {# workout} other {# workouts}} from Garmin
{label} is scheduled here. Strength training the same day may compromise it.
View and edit the details of the selected workout.
Add a new workout to the selected date.
View and edit the details of the selected strength session.
View the details of the selected activity.
Sum ({sum} {unit}) must be within {pct}% of original ({total} {unit})
Original distance: {total} {unit}. Both runs will be on the same day.
Show {count, plural, one {# more strength session} other {# more strength sessions}}
{count, plural, one {# more session} other {# more sessions}}
Ask about your training, recent performance, or get a workout suggestion.
How is my training tracking against the plan so far?
Have I done enough quality work this phase?
What should I focus on in the next two weeks?
Can you suggest a workout for tomorrow?
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Ask me about your training plan, recent activities, or for advice.
Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
Review and adjust the proposed workout before applying it.
At least one exercise is required
{error}. The coach's proposal can't be applied.
Tip: Import into a separate calendar (e.g. "Training Plan") so you can delete that calendar later to remove all workouts.
Training cycles you have finished — preserved as historical records

This will permanently delete your training history for this plan, including all its workouts from the calendar. Your logged activities will not be affected, but the planned workout records will be gone.
This cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this active plan? All scheduled workouts and progress will be lost. This cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this draft plan? This cannot be undone.
Note: any workouts already sent to Garmin Connect will NOT be removed automatically. Use "Remove all from Garmin Connect" in your Profile before deleting if you want them cleared.
Tell us about your goals and we'll recommend personalized training templates
New to running, or returning after a long break
Can run 30 minutes continuously, some race experience
Regular runner, comfortable with structured training and speedwork
Competitive runner, experienced with high-volume and intense training
Select up to {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}. If specified, these will be your required rest days.
Provide race time or <link>VDOT</link> to calculate target paces - will be captured in your user profile
Please enter your current weekly volume in {unit}
Goal date must be in the future
Start date must be before goal date
You already have an active plan "{name}". Go back to the Plans page and start a new plan from there to replace it.
You already have an active plan. Go back to the Plans page and start a new plan from there to replace it.
Working with your AI Coach to generate your plan. This can take between 2 and 10 minutes, depending on the selected AI Coach model used.
Your personalized training plan is ready!
The following workouts have distances that seem unusual. This may be due to LLM calculation errors:
Consider regenerating the plan or manually adjusting these workouts.
Redirecting to review page in 5 seconds...
Missing required criteria. Please go back and fill the form.
Failed to load recommendations. Please try again.
Try adjusting your criteria (more weeks, higher mileage tolerance, or fewer training days)
You already have an active plan “{name}”. Creating a new one will archive it. Completed workouts from the old plan will stay in your activity history.
You already have an active plan. Creating a new one will archive it. Completed workouts from the old plan will stay in your activity history.
Found {count, plural, one {# plan} other {# plans}} matching your criteria
Marathon training typically requires 12+ weeks. You have {weeks, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}} available.
Half marathon training typically requires 8+ weeks. You have {weeks, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}} available.
5K training typically requires 6+ weeks. You have {weeks, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}} available.
10K training typically requires 6+ weeks. You have {weeks, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}} available.
Your timeline of {weeks, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}} is shorter than typical for {goalType} training.
The AI coach will adapt the selected plan to fit your schedule, but consider that compressed training increases injury risk.
These plans are based on established training methodologies and personalized to your needs. They are inspired by proven approaches but customized for you.
{weeks, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}} • {goalType} • Goal: {goalDate}
Are you sure you want to delete this active plan? All workouts and progress will be lost. This cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this draft plan? This cannot be undone.
Failed to load activities. Please try again later.
{count, plural, one {# activity} other {# activities}} selected
No activities found. Try adjusting your filters or sync your activities.
Are you sure you want to delete {count, plural, one {# activity} other {# activities}}? This action cannot be undone. Linked workout references will be cleared automatically.
Review and approve potential duplicate activities
{confidence, select, high {high} medium {medium} low {low} other {{confidence}}} confidence ({score}%)
We found a similar activity that might be a duplicate.
Generate an AI coaching summary for this activity.
Already pushed to {platforms}. Regenerating will only update the summary here.
Link this activity to a planned workout
This activity is not linked to any workout

Delete "{name}"? Sessions you have already completed will be kept so your training history is preserved. Pending and skipped sessions will be removed from your calendar.
This cannot be undone.
Paste a strength or mobility plan and the AI will parse it, schedule sessions around your running, and let you sync them to Garmin.
Insert your strength workout details and timing requirements and they will be interpreted and presented for scheduling.
Variation is fine — the AI tolerates non-standard formatting and will flag anything ambiguous.
Fixed number of sessions, repeats for the number of weeks selected below.
The complete schedule, written out session by session. Sessions are placed on the calendar once.
Helps you to uniquely identify your plans.
Select your start date and if applicable, number of repeat weeks.
Paste your strength or mobility program here...
Re-validated against catalog. {count, plural, one {# exercise} other {# exercises}} updated: {flipped}
{count, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} · content type: {contentType} · parse confidence: {confidence}%
This does not look like a strength or mobility plan.
Review carefully before importing, or go back and adjust your input.

Starting {date}, {sessions, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} per week × {weeks} weeks = {total} sessions. The AI distributes them around your running plan; adjust individual dates below before importing.
Starting {date}. The AI distributes sessions around your running plan; adjust individual dates below before importing.
{count, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} scheduled. Edit a date below to override the AI's choice, or click a session on the calendar above to jump to it.
Duration must be a non-negative number
Moved to {date}. Couldn't update Garmin — resend manually.
At least one exercise is required
These will appear on the watch using a close-enough Garmin exercise label, or as a generic step with the exercise name in the description.
No exact Garmin match. Will send as a close-enough Garmin exercise, or as a generic step with the exercise name shown in the description.
Matched to the closest Garmin exercise:
How did it go? Anything to remember next time?
Will send all {count, plural, one {# exercise} other {# exercises}}.
Connect Garmin in Settings to enable strength workout sync.
This will remove the session from the calendar. The parent program stays intact. This cannot be undone.
At least one exercise is required
Sign in to access your training platform
Your account has been created and is awaiting admin approval. You'll receive access once an administrator approves your account.
Your account has been created and is awaiting admin approval. You'll be able to access the platform once your account is approved.
Detailed trend analysis coming in future updates.
Please select both start and end dates
{count, plural, one {# activity matched to workouts} other {# activities matched to workouts}}
Sync already in progress. Please wait and try again.
Sync your activities from Garmin and Strava
Ask questions or request changes using workout codes (e.g., "Make W4:D2 easier")
Start a conversation about your training plan.
Try: "What's the purpose of W1:D3?" or "Make W5:D2 10km instead"
Type your message... (Shift+Enter for new line)
View the details of the selected workout.
Skip this recovery after the last rep
Delete this workout from the plan? This cannot be undone.
Merge both runs back into a single workout?
Run 1 and Run 2 will be combined into one workout with their distances summed. Garmin sync state will reset — you can re-send to Garmin afterwards.
You must be logged in to modify plans
Plan not found or you do not have access
{count, plural, one {Successfully applied # operation} other {Successfully applied # operations}}
{count, plural, one {Successfully updated # week} other {Successfully updated # weeks}}
Move all rest days to Fridays
Describe how you'd like to modify "{planName}" and the AI will regenerate the affected weeks.
E.g., Move all rest days to Fridays, or Make week 5 easier, or Change W4:D2 to 12km tempo...
Describe how to modify this plan
This will take approximately {time} with your current LLM provider.
Review the proposed changes before applying them to your plan
View changes by week ({count} weeks affected)
{count, plural, one {# week affected} other {# weeks affected}}
